name: 400 MG Imatinib Tablets IP
about: 400 MG Imatinib Tablets IP is a medication used to treat certain types of cancer, including chronic myeloid leukemia (CML), gastrointestinal stromal tumors (GISTs), and dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans (DFSP). The tablets come in a convenient dosage form and should be stored in a dry place to maintain their efficacy. These tablets are manufactured in India and have a normal fermentation smell. They have a shelf life of 12-24 months, making them a reliable option for long-term treatment. As an exporter, supplier, and trader of pharmaceutical products, we take pride in providing high-quality medicines to our customers.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of 400 MG Imatinib Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage form of 400 MG Imatinib Tablets IP is a tablet.

faq.q: Where should I store these tablets?
faq.a: It is recommended to store these tablets in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the origin of these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: How long do these tablets last before they expire?
faq.a: These tablets have a shelf life of 12-24 months.

faq.q: Is the fermentation smell of these tablets normal?
faq.a: Yes, the fermentation smell of these tablets is normal.
